OCR Evaluation — medicine_package

Update OCR algorithm README and eval HTML summary metric 8f1041207f4e08a7df1f23c5e742bbfebfd81bbe - Document the two-phase orientation detection: variance scoring + OCR-confidence tiebreaker (cls=False for 0°/180°, cls=True for 90°/270°) - Document key-phrase recall evaluation mode (Mode B) alongside CER (Mode A) - Note that the HTML summary now shows pass/fail count, not mean CER Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com> eval_20260628_004  ·  2026-06-28 01:32:51.366203 UTC
